_comment: Tier-2 Layer-F companion: inverted-gate fixture. Initially caught 3 known-broken stokes templates (skfem/ngsolve/fenics) on 2026-06-01. ngsolve was fixed in a follow-up commit (free.Clear(V.ndof) pressure pin) and moved to the main Layer F gate. The 2 remaining rows: skfem stokes::2d ships homogeneous BC + missing pressure pin → ValueError from condense (task #26); fenics stokes XDMFFile.write_function fails on sol.sub(0).collapse() (task #28). The fixture also asserts the FAILURE MODE matches the documented token — a partial fix that changes the error class but doesn't fully repair the template trips wrong_failure_mode_count.
